title: Ivyline Monza Ceramic Vintage Blue Planter 15.5Cm VBM1416, Cream/Pink/Blue
description: From the manufacturer Monza Vintage Blue Planter Blooming beautiful. Our Monza planter catches the eye in so many ways, with its all-over floral print creating a charming focal point in any space. Round with a premium glaze, this waterproof planter wonderfully offsets the lush greens and vibrant hues of your houseplants and florals, perfectly brightening up your sills or shelving.
